title: KEYCORP RAISES ITS PRIME LENDING RATE TO 3.50 PERCENT
text: CLEVELAND , March 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) and its banking affiliates have raised their prime lending rate to 3.50 percent from 3.25 percent, effective tomorrow, March 17, 2022. About KeyCorp KeyCorp's roots trace back nearly 200 years to Albany, New York.

title: KeyBank Joins Credit Risk Navigator, the AFS/RMA Next-Generation Commercial Credit Risk Benchmarking Service
text: EXTON, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #CommercialCredit--KeyBank is the latest member of the RMA Credit Risk Navigator, powered by AFS, a database with important commercial credit metrics for banks.
